title: Rendering model distribution
explanation: How terminals turn output into a visible surface.

title: Engine family distribution
explanation: High-level engine architecture used by the core model.

title: Interaction complexity distribution
explanation: How much the interface reshapes classic terminal use.

title: Workspace model distribution
explanation: Session, workspace, and console organization patterns.

title: Ecosystem family distribution
explanation: Contextual ecosystem grouping; not a structural similarity field.
